hooks.command: node -e "const i=JSON.parse(process.env.CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT||'{}');const f=i.file_path||i.path||'';const s=i.old_string||i.content||'';if(/\.env$|\.env\./.test(f)){console.error('BLOCKED: .env files are protected');process.exit(2);}if(/ENCRYPTION_KEY|DATABASE_URL|JWT_SECRET/.test(s)&&!/src\/models\/db\.js|src\/index\.js/.test(f)){console.error('BLOCKED: credential strings detected in unexpected file');process.exit(2);}" 2>&1

node -e "const i=JSON.parse(process.env.CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT||'{}');const f=i.file_path||i.path||'';if(/src\/(bot|routes)\/.+\.js$/.test(f)){console.log('\u26a1 '+f+' changed — Railway will hot-reload (nodemon). If bot is running, restart it for changes to take effect.');}" 2>&1
